extension.description: Codeちゃんは見ている。 A dockable VS Code companion that quietly watches your work.

views.codechan.name: Codeちゃん
configuration.title: Guruguru Codechan

walkthrough.title: Get Started with Guruguru Codechan
walkthrough.description: Open the dockable Codeちゃん view, play with her gaze, adjust settings, and import local character assets.
walkthrough.open.title: Open the Codeちゃん view
walkthrough.open.description:
Open the dockable Codeちゃん view from the Command Palette.
[Open Codechan View](command:guruguru-codechan.openCanvas)
walkthrough.settings.title: Adjust settings and local assets
walkthrough.settings.description:
Use the settings layer to adjust position, scale, gaze lock, import, and delete actions.
[Toggle Codechan Settings](command:guruguru-codechan.toggleSettings)
walkthrough.rights.title: Confirm character asset rights

Bundled sample assets are non-commercial. User-imported assets remain governed by the user's or licensor's rights.
[Read bundled asset license](https://github.com/Hitsuki-Ban/guruguru-codechan/blob/main/extension/ASSET_LICENSE.md)
